name: Aic Mines Limited
analysis: A1M has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. Volume is expanding (1.5× the 20-day average) — real participation. Price has broken above the base high at A$0.7150. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$0.7420, stop A$0.5470, target A$1.3271 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
